text: Alfredson eccentric loading and Silbernagel combined concentric-eccentric loading produce equivalent clinical outcomes for midportion Achilles tendinopathy at 1-year follow-up.
specific_value: treatment effect 2.4 VISA-A points [95% CI, -8.5 to 13.3]; P = .656
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy

text: Both Alfredson eccentric and Silbernagel concentric-eccentric loading significantly improve VISA-A scores from approximately 60 at baseline to 83-89 at 1 year in midportion Achilles tendinopathy.
specific_value: VISA-A from 60.7 to 89.4 (Alfredson) and 59.8 to 83.2 (Silbernagel), P < .001
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy

text: A higher proportion of patients perceive themselves as improved after 1 year with Silbernagel combined loading compared to Alfredson eccentric-only loading.
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy

text: Eccentric and combined concentric-eccentric loading programs for Achilles tendinopathy can be effectively delivered as home-based programs with limited supervision.
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy

text: Both Alfredson and Silbernagel loading protocols achieve high adherence rates when prescribed as home-based programs for Achilles tendinopathy.
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy

text: Clinical improvements from loading programs in midportion Achilles tendinopathy are evident by 12 weeks and continue through 26 weeks and 1 year of follow-up.
population: recreational athletes with midportion Achilles tendinopathy
